common.title: Sllem
common.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this record? This action cannot be undone.

auth.login_sub: Please sign in to access the control panel
auth.error_failed: Authentication failed. Please verify your credentials.

dashboard.subtitle: Monitor your logistics dispatch lifecycle, dynamic prices, and driver status metrics.

orders.title: Orders & Parcel Dispatch Management
orders.select_driver: Choose a driver for this order

categories.title: Delivery Item Categories
categories.name: Category Name
categories.no_categories: No categories configured. Add one above.
categories.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this category?
categories.delete_confirm_sub: This action cannot be undone and will fail if the category is linked to sizes or orders.

sizes.title: Package Sizes Directory
sizes.name: Size Name
sizes.no_sizes: No package sizes active currently. Create one above.
sizes.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this package size?
sizes.delete_confirm_sub: This action cannot be undone and will fail if the size is linked to active or past orders.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp Settings
whatsapp.bot_disabled_msg: WhatsApp OTP integration is disabled in the server settings (.env). Set ENABLE_OTP_WHATSAPP=true to activate.
whatsapp.scan_instruction: Open WhatsApp on your phone, go to Linked Devices, and scan the QR code below:

cities.title: Cities & Map Anchors Directory
cities.map_instruction: Click anywhere on the map to automatically capture and fill the coordinates.
cities.no_cities: No cities currently mapped. Create one above.
cities.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this city?
cities.delete_confirm_sub: All stations and routes belonging to this city will be deleted permanently.

route_prices.title: Route Pricing Rules
route_prices.no_routes: No route specific pricing rules configured. Set one above.
route_prices.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this route pricing rule?
route_prices.delete_confirm_sub: Future orders for this route will lose the pricing standard.
route_prices.save_failed: Failed to save route pricing rule.
route_prices.delete_failed: Failed to delete route pricing rule.

system_alerts.network_error_body: Please check your Wi-Fi or mobile data connection and try again.
system_alerts.session_timeout_body: You have been logged out for security. Please sign in again to continue.
system_alerts.server_error_body: We are facing a temporary server issue. The tech team has been notified, please try again shortly.
system_alerts.wrong_password_body: The password you entered does not match our records. You can try again or reset it.
system_alerts.fields_required_body: Please fill in all fields marked with (*) to save your data successfully.
system_alerts.invalid_phone_body: The phone number entered does not match the required format (e.g. 777777777). Please check and try again.
system_alerts.save_success_body: All modifications and data have been successfully saved to the system and are active.
system_alerts.request_submitted_body: We have received your request and it is being reviewed by the dispatch team. You can track it in the menu.
system_alerts.profile_updated_body: Your account details and password have been successfully updated.
system_alerts.insufficient_balance_body: Your current wallet balance is insufficient to cover this service. Please recharge to continue.
system_alerts.area_unsupported_body: We are sorry, our delivery services do not cover your current location yet. We are expanding soon!
system_alerts.account_locked_body: Max login attempts exceeded to protect your account. Please try again in 15 minutes.
system_alerts.delete_confirm_title: Are you sure you want to delete?
system_alerts.delete_confirm_body: Warning: This action is permanent and will delete the data forever. It cannot be recovered.
system_alerts.logout_confirm_body: Are you sure you want to log out? You will need to enter your credentials to log in again.
system_alerts.cancel_order_confirm_body: Are you sure you want to cancel this order? An additional fee may apply if the driver is already on the way.
